# User template — Social captions (English)

## Placeholders

`{{brand}}` `{{platform}}` `{{tone}}` `{{topic}}` `{{cta}}` `{{emoji_policy}}`

## Template

"Write a `{{platform}}` caption for `{{brand}}` in `{{tone}}` tone about `{{topic}}`. CTA: `{{cta}}`. Emoji policy: `{{emoji_policy}}`."

## Filled examples

1. "Write an Instagram caption for **Lagoon Bay** in **Friendly / Warm** tone about sunrise beach mornings in Hurghada. CTA: book via WhatsApp. Emoji policy: max 3 emojis."

2. "Write a Facebook caption for **SeaLine Tours** in **Persuasive / Sales** tone about a limited 30% summer discount. CTA: click link in first comment. Emoji policy: no emojis."
